name: Talib Kweli
description:
'''Talib Kweli Greene''' ({{IPAc-en|t|æ|ˈ|l|ɪ|b|_|k|w|ɑː|ˈ|l|iː}} {{respell|tah|LIB|_|kwa|LEE}}; born October 3, 1975) is an American rapper. He is one half of the hip-hop duo [[Black Star (rap duo)|Black Star]], which he formed in 1997 with fellow [[Brooklyn]] rapper [[Mos Def]]. Their 1998 single, "[[Definition (song)|Definition]]", entered the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]] and preceded their [[Mos Def & Talib Kweli Are Black Star|eponymous debut album]] (1998), which entered the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]]. The duo then began pursuing solo careers, although one further Black Star album — ''[[No Fear of Time]]'' (2022) — has been released. 

In 2011, Kweli founded his own record label, Javotti Media.
